data.title: Jeff Bezos Had More Money Than All Bitcoins Put Together Just 4 Years Ago, This Was The Moment When It Changed
data.description: Jeff Bezos, founder of tech giant Amazon, has amassed enormous wealth over the last few decades, with figures relating to his personal fortune astounding people from time to time.

data.title: NYPD Warns About 'Wanted' Posters Targeting Finance Executives, And Crossed-Out UnitedHealthcare CEO (UPDATED)
data.description: The NYPD has issued a warning about threats to healthcare executives following the murder of UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson, highlighting the circulation of "Wanted" posters and rising security concerns amidst extremist reactions online.

data.title: Chainlink Price Soars 22% On President-Elect Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial Purchases: How High Can LINK Go?
data.description: Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) soared 22% in 24 hours, bringing its month-over-month performance to 93% as fundamental developments point to a bullish future.

data.title: China Might Be Pivoting To 'Moderately Loose' Monetary Policy, But Experts Feel 'Bazooka-Style Stimulus' Won't Arrive Immediately
data.description: China's leadership surprised markets on Monday by indicating a shift in monetary policy after 14 years.

data.title: Quantum-Si Strengthens Global Footprint With Expanded Partner Network
data.description: Quantum-Si expands international distribution network to 15 partners, positioning for continued revenue growth in 2025 and beyond.
